validation_commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
skills = sorted(Path('skills').glob('*/SKILL.md'))
missing = [str(p) for p in skills if 'Sequential Thinking MCP Gate' not in p.read_text() or 'sequential_thinking' not in p.read_text()]
print('skills', len(skills), 'missing', len(missing))
if missing:
    print('\n'.join(missing))
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
